description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, open floor plan. The exterior features a mix of light wood paneling and dark gray cladding, with numerous large windows providing ample natural light throughout the structure. The house includes a prominent front entryway with steps, a covered porch, and landscaped greenery, as well as a backyard area with a rectangular swimming pool and deck. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a variety of window sizes and placements, including several large picture windows and sliding glass doors. The roof is primarily flat, with some sections featuring parapet walls and rooftop access. The overall design is contemporary, emphasizing clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A spacious, modern two-story house with flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, wood and dark gray exterior, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, porch, and landscaped trees, as well as large windows and wood paneling.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, deck area, and additional windows, with a clear view of the house's depth and layout.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio, and large sliding glass doors leading to the backyard, with more visible window variety.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's width, additional entry points, and more landscaping, with a clear look at the flat roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, covered porch, large glass door, and landscaped flanking trees
